title: picramniaceae
intro: The Picramniaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a small and distinct group of plants primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The Picramniaceae family includes around 12 to 15 genera, with species commonly known as "Picrasma" and "Achocella". These plants are characterized by their unique flowers and often woody growth habits, adding to their diversity within this family.
